title: Savory Polish Sardine Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful pilaf dish from Poland, featuring sardines for added protein and a savory twist.

ingredients.name: Savory spices
ingredients.notes: paprika, garlic powder, and dried thyme

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add Polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove sausage from skillet and set aside.
4. Add diced onion and carrot to skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
5. Add rice to skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Add chicken broth, sardines, savory spices, salt, and black pepper to skillet.
7. Stir to combine, then bring mixture to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until rice is tender.
9. Fluff pilaf with a fork and stir in cooked sausage.
